name: diff-summary
description: One-call structured triage of a git diff — file-by-file role classification (source/test/config/doc/generated/build/fixture/migration), risk tier (low/medium/high) with reasons, public-API touch detection, co-changed-test detection, secret-risk path flagging, and aggregate stats. Replaces the 5–20 Read calls an agent burns reading each modified file to figure out 'what kind of change is this'.
